hero.heading: A clear headline for your product
hero.sub: A short supporting sentence that explains what you do and who it is for. Keep this to two lines maximum.

projects.title: Project Alpha
projects.description: A brand identity system built from the ground up — logo, colour palette, type scale, and usage guidelines delivered as a comprehensive brand book.

projects.title: Project Beta
projects.description: A responsive marketing site designed to convert visitors into leads, with a clear information architecture and performance-first build.

projects.title: Project Gamma
projects.description: A go-to-market strategy that mapped the competitive landscape, defined audience segments, and produced a 12-month execution roadmap.

projects.title: Project Delta
projects.description: A custom web application built with performance and accessibility in mind, delivering a seamless experience across all devices.

projects.title: Project Epsilon
projects.description: A visual identity refresh for an established business entering a new market — retaining brand equity while signalling a bold new direction.

projects.title: Project Zeta
projects.description: An e-commerce storefront redesign focused on reducing friction in the purchase journey and increasing average order value.
